title: Run /devmeta:reflect 2.1
description:
## Objective
Run the full I&A reflection skill for iteration 2.1. The skill drives the entire 12-step process (code review, docs audit, gap verification, project-history update, plan reassessment).

## Implementation
Invoke the skill: `/devmeta:reflect 2.1`.
Do NOT break this into sub-tasks — the skill handles the full sequence internally.

## Tests
Skill exits cleanly; lessons-learned.md / project-history.md updated if applicable.
